response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analysed the video for scene transitions and vocal music. 2. Identified the song 'DISCOTHEQUE' using on-screen text ('Music: 上松範康 (Elements Garden)', 'Lyrics: 園田凌士'). 3. Confirmed Nana Mizuki as the original artist. 4. Identified the performers as Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, Aki Rosenthal, and Azki. 5. Searched for and retrieved the full lyrics in Japanese and created an English translation. 6. Structured the data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, Aki Rosenthal, and Azki performing the song 'DISCOTHEQUE' by Nana Mizuki on stage during their birthday celebration. The video begins with an introductory MC/talk segment followed by the full song performance.

scenes.description: The performers are on stage talking, introducing the upcoming performance. No vocal music is playing.
The performers sing 'DISCOTHEQUE' by Nana Mizuki, complete with choreography. Text on screen identifies the song title, lyricist, and composer.
scenes.performer_in_video: Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, Aki Rosenthal, and Azki

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(CHU-LU CHU-LU CHU-LU PA-YA-PA)
(DISCO LADY DISCO LADY DEEP EMOTION DEEP EMOTION)
SWEETIE DARLIN', let's dance
Bursting BEAUTY LADY
Reborn in a sweet dream
I want to gently color it
Glamorous lips
Pink, glossy nails
The true self reflected on the other side of the glass
Surreal Days, I want to show it only to you
In my heart, in the depths of my eyes, AH, I want you to be by my side
Illuminated by the moon's MIRROR BALL, MY DARLIN'
Hey, let's have a vivid love
Bursting SEXY BEAUTY
Reborn in a sweet dream
Gently coloring MY LOVE
Look, the world is changing
(CHU-LU CHU-LU CHU-LU PA-YA-PA)
(SEXY FEELING CHU CHU...CHU CHU...)
Dramatic passion
An unfading déjà vu, I want to keep seeing it
A colorful SWEETY STORY
Deep in my heart, I carve it in
Even if a little darkness visits
If I chant the love spell
Yes, surely
In the endless sky, a SHOWER of stardust
Pours down

50/50 (Fifty-fifty), put it together
Love that is over 100%
I believe that it is surely here, unwavering
